personalInfo.description: While many learned to code in controlled environments, I built my foundation in the real world, where there was no margin for error. This shaped a fundamental approach to my work: I don’t build for the sake of using trendy stacks; I build because there’s a problem that needs a robust solution. I prioritize foundations over frameworks and purpose over hype. My goal is simple: to ship software that works, lasts, and solves real-world challenges.
